name: pluto
description: Use TalentPluto's live recruiting workflows through a stable, authenticated Pluto connection.

interface.shortDescription: Use TalentPluto recruiting tools in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Connect once to use TalentPluto's live recruiting workflows in Codex. Pluto advertises its current tools and input contracts from its MCP server, and consequential actions require explicit user direction.
defaultPrompt: Use Pluto to help with this recruiting task.
Find AI engineers with 1+ years of professional experience in New York.
Find people who match this pasted job description.
How many Pluto credits do I have left, and when do they reset?
Get the available professional email for the out-of-network candidate I selected.
Continue with the candidate and role I selected in Pluto.
